address: Chae Son National Park, Mueang Pan District, Lampang
opening_hours: National-park and bath hours can change; recheck before departure

description.en: The cleanest nature-side contrast day from Lampang, combining hot springs with a forested national-park setting.
description.nl: De schoonste natuurgerichte contrastdag vanuit Lampang, met warmwaterbronnen in een bosrijk nationaal park.

metaTitle.en: Chae Son National Park Lampang | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Chae Son National Park Lampang | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Chae Son is the best nature-day contrast from Lampang and how to keep it as a single-focus outing.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Chae Son de beste naturendag-contrast vanuit Lampang is en hoe je het als single-focus outing houdt.

enhanced_description:
Chae Son National Park is the cleanest nature-side contrast to Lampang's temple and old-town rhythm. TAT continues to list Chae Son Hot Spring among the province's outer-city highlights, and that is the right role for it: not a random extra, but the one nature day that makes a heritage-heavy Lampang stay feel more balanced.

It is strongest when it stays single-focus. Go for the hot springs, the forest setting, and the change of pace, then come back. The park gets weaker when travelers try to combine it with another major outer-city route on the same day just because both sit outside the city center.
detailed_history: The wider TAT Lampang province framing continues to treat Chae Son Hot Spring as one of the province's signature non-city attractions. That matters because it confirms the park's status as a core regional contrast stop rather than as a minor local add-on.
visitor_experience: Expect a road-trip nature day rather than a city extension. The appeal is the break in texture: forest, thermal water, and a slower outdoor rhythm. It works best when you want one out-of-town nature block instead of another heritage stop.

best_time_to_visit.duration: Half a day to most of a day
best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Can be busier on weekends and holidays

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Reach it by road and keep the day dedicated to the park.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: This is better as the day's main purpose than as one stop in a chain of outer-city attractions.
practical_info.food_options: Keep meals practical and secondary to the park schedule.
practical_info.shopping: Minimal and not central to the visit.

insider_tips: Use Chae Son when you want one nature day instead of trying to do both Chae Son and TECC in the same short stay.
Start early because the transfer is long enough that timing matters.
Recheck current official park and bath pricing before departure.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current Tourism Authority of Thailand Lampang attraction framing. Exact entry, bath fees, and operating conditions should be checked with current official sources before travel.
cultural_significance: Chae Son gives Lampang a practical nature-and-hot-springs counterweight to the province's stronger temple and city heritage story.
